articles.title: Apple working on iPhone anti-snatching feature
articles.summary: Apple is making a new security feature for iPhones. It will lock the phone if it's taken quickly from a hand.
articles.impact: This new feature aims to deter phone theft and protect user data.

articles.title: DuckDuckGo installs rise as users avoid Google's AI Search
articles.summary: More people are downloading DuckDuckGo. They don't want Google's new AI search results. DuckDuckGo offers an alternative.
articles.impact: This trend shows user preference for search engines that offer more control and less AI integration.

articles.title: Windows 11 update brings performance gains
articles.summary: A new Windows 11 update makes PCs faster. It improves responsiveness and overall performance. This update is now available.
articles.impact: Users can expect a smoother and quicker computing experience with this latest update.

articles.title: Memorial Day Apple deals still active
articles.summary: Some good deals on Apple products remain. You can still get MacBook Airs and AirPods at lower prices.
articles.impact: These lingering deals offer a chance to buy Apple devices at a reduced cost.

articles.title: PC makers respond to Apple's MacBook Neo
articles.summary: Computer makers are creating new laptops. They are responding to Apple's recent MacBook Neo. The goal is affordable, good machines.
articles.impact: This competition aims to bring more affordable and high-quality laptops to the market.

articles.title: Street Fighter 6 update maintenance revealed
articles.summary: Street Fighter 6 is getting a big update. It adds Ingrid and new content. Server maintenance times are now known.
articles.impact: Players can prepare for the new content with scheduled server downtime.

articles.title: Destruction AllStars delisted from PS5
articles.summary: The game Destruction AllStars is no longer available on PS5. It was removed due to technical issues. It has been down for a while.
articles.impact: Players can no longer access or purchase the game due to persistent technical problems.

articles.title: Marathon Season 2 brings survival horror change
articles.summary: Marathon's second season changes the game significantly. It adds a survival horror element. A new trailer shows this shift.
articles.impact: This significant shift in gameplay mechanics is expected to draw players back to Marathon.
